title: Go Diagnose Skill Config
description: Configuration for the go-diagnose workflow skill.

mode.description: Operation mode: diagnose stops at root cause identification; diagnose_and_fix applies and verifies the fix.

run_tests.description: When true, run go build, go test, and go vet as part of diagnosis and verification.

depth.description: Analysis depth: fast (read reported location only), normal (trace call path + run diagnostics), deep (all plus pprof profiling, goroutine analysis).
